parameters.name: jql
parameters.value: project = KAN AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority ASC, created DESC

parameters.name: jql
parameters.value: project = KAN AND statusCategory = Done ORDER BY updated DESC

parameters.content:
## WF-1.10 — Dashboard Semanal QA
**Schedule:** Martes y Viernes 4pm Chile (UTC 19:00)

**Flujo:**
1. Jira: bugs abiertos (por prioridad)
2. Jira: bugs resueltos ultimos 7 dias
3. GitHub: ultimos 10 runs del pipeline
4. Code: calcula KPIs + HTML premium
5. Gmail: envia dashboard

**Asunto:** Dashboard Semanal (Jira+GitHub) — XX% Pass Rate
